subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! The Wronged One remembereth thee from His Praiseworthy Station and announceth unto thee the glad-tidings of God's mercy and His loving-kindness, that thou mayest rejoice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود یذکرک المظلوم من مقامه المحمود و یبشرک برحمه الله و عنایته لتفرح
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
